conflictBlocks.theirsContent: className="overflow-x-hidden bg-[#07110F] text-[#FFF8E7]"

conflictBlocks.oursContent:
{/*
          New background approach:
          - Remove the large animated blur-orbs (they read as "generic dark site" and cost GPU).
          - Use a simple, *static* layered background: subtle teal + gold aura + pixel grid + scanlines.
          This keeps the vibe (D&D + retro console) but looks less like Twitch/modern neon.
        */}
conflictBlocks.theirsContent: {/* Background: D&D dungeon-ink + Dreamcast teal accents (static + lightweight) */}
{/* Base vignette */}
className="absolute inset-0"

conflictBlocks.oursContent:
backgroundImage:
                "radial-gradient(900px 520px at 15% 10%, rgba(0, 209, 193, 0.10), rgba(0,0,0,0) 55%), radial-gradient(900px 520px at 85% 25%, rgba(212, 175, 55, 0.08), rgba(0,0,0,0) 60%), radial-gradient(900px 620px at 50% 95%, rgba(42, 74, 42, 0.16), rgba(0,0,0,0) 62%)",

conflictBlocks.theirsContent: background: #0b1211;
background: #223330;
border: 2px solid #0b1211;
background: #00d1c1;
{/* Beta Banner - keep strong red for visibility */}

conflictBlocks.oursContent: <nav className="bg-dungeon-stone/95 border-b-3 border-pixel-border sticky top-9 z-20 pixel-grid-bg">

      <nav className="bg-[#0B1211]/92 backdrop-blur border-b-3 border-[#223330] sticky top-9 z-20 pixel-grid-bg">
wordClassName="text-purple-200"

conflictBlocks.oursContent:
<DesktopNav
              unreadMessageCount={unreadMessageCount}
              unreadCount={unreadCount}
              messagesOpen={messagesOpen}
              setMessagesOpen={setMessagesOpen}
              notificationsOpen={notificationsOpen}
              setNotificationsOpen={setNotificationsOpen}
              shownConversations={shownConversations}
              notifications={notifications}
              onConversationClick={(id) =>
                openConversation(id, setMessagesOpen)
              }
              onNotificationClick={(n) =>
                openNotification(n, setNotificationsOpen)
              }
              onMarkAllRead={() => markAllAsReadMutation.mutate()}
              isMarkingAllRead={markAllAsReadMutation.isPending}
              onFeatureClick={handleFeatureClick}
              onLogout={handleLogout}
              messagesRef={messagesRef}
              notificationsRef={notificationsRef}
            />
conflictBlocks.theirsContent: {/* Messenger */}

conflictBlocks.oursContent:
<MobileNotificationsDropdown
              notifications={notifications}
              unreadCount={unreadCount}
              onMarkAllRead={() => markAllAsReadMutation.mutate()}
              onNotificationClick={(n) =>
                openNotification(n, setNotificationsOpen)
              }
              isMarkingAllRead={markAllAsReadMutation.isPending}
            />
conflictBlocks.theirsContent:
Notifications
{shownNotifications.length === 0 ? (
You're all caught up.
) : ( shownNotifications.map((n) => { const unread = !n.read; const bg = unread ? "bg-[#10201D]" : "bg-transparent"; return ( ); }) )}

preservedBehaviors: Tailwind config has D&D retro gaming theme colors and font families
Tailwind config has gold-glow and forest-glow box shadows
Layout has Press A 2 Start metadata and social share configuration
Layout imports ClientProviders and has pixel-grid-bg styling
Navigation uses useUser, useNotifications, useConversations hooks
Navigation has BetaBanner, DesktopNav, MobileNav, MobileMenu components
Tailwind config has dreamcast-teal and remaps purple to teal range (theirs)
Tailwind config has teal-glow box shadow (theirs)
Layout body uses bg-[#07110F] with Dreamcast teal gradient accents (theirs)
Layout has CRT scanlines effect and pixel grid with teal color (theirs)
Layout scrollbar uses dark teal colors (theirs)
Tailwind config has ink-secondary and ink-muted text helpers (ours)
Navigation nav has bg-dungeon-stone/95, border-pixel-border, sticky top-9 (ours)
Navigation uses DesktopNav, MobileNav, MobileNotificationsDropdown, MobileMenu components (ours)
